full_text:
Xun Wei (Gonggao) 荀緯 (公高)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Wei (荀緯), styledGonggao (公高), was born in Henei. A man of literary ability, wrote many books and helped compile the Imperial Readings. Xun Wei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xun Wei lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
